basic_details.job_title: V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Siddha Medical Office, Ayurvedha Medical Officer Posts
basic_details.post_name: Siddha Medical Officer & Ayurvedha Medical Officer
basic_details.short_information: V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority Siddha Medical Officer & Ayurvedha Medical Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 08 May 2026 on the official website V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority . A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the VOCPA Siddha Medical Officer & Ayurvedha Medical Officer Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: BSMS/BAMS, One year post qualification experience
qualification.details: Siddha Medical Officer (On contract): BSMS, One year post qualification experience. Ayurvedha Medical Officer (On contract): BAMS, One year post qualification experience.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: vocport.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 16-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority recruitment is 16 May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the walk-in interview date for these posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Siddha Medical Officer and Ayurvedha Medical Officer posts will be conducted on 18 May 2026. Candidates are advised to be present on time.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for these positions?
faq.answer: For the Siddha Medical Officer post, a BSMS degree is required, and for the Ayurvedha Medical Officer post, a BAMS degree is necessary. Both require one year of post-qualification experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the advertised posts is 45 years. There is no mention of minimum age limit or age relaxation in the provided data.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Medical Officer positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Siddha Medical Officer and Ayurvedha Medical Officer posts will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 50,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment drive?
faq.answer: V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority is recruiting for a total of 2 vacancies. One post is for Siddha Medical Officer and the other is for Ayurvedha Medical Officer.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their filled application forms to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for these contractual positions will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority, which is vocport.gov.in. Links are provided in the Important Links section.
